story.title: Story
story.body:
Our story began with a clear belief:
high-performance carbon components require more than good materials —
they require full control.

As engineers and riders, we saw too many products built through fragmented processes,
where design, manufacturing, and quality control were separated.
The result was inconsistency, delayed communication, and avoidable risk.

We started with carbon rims, one of the most technically demanding components in cycling.
From layup structure and resin control to impact resistance,
every decision was made with performance and safety in mind.

As our capabilities expanded, we naturally moved into complete wheelsets
and carbon handlebars.
Not to chase a broader product range,
but to ensure that every component works together as a complete system.

Today, our OEM and ODM solutions are trusted by partners around the world.
From design and engineering to manufacturing and testing,
everything is built in-house.
This allows us to deliver consistent quality, reliable lead times,
and products that meet the expectations of global markets.

We believe long-term partnerships are built on transparency,
stable quality, and accountability.
That principle continues to guide how we work with brands,
distributors, and riders worldwide.  Whether developing a new product or scaling an existing design,
we work as an extension of our partners’ teams.

innovationRd.subtitle: A look at what we’re building next—hub concepts, protected design work, and our next-generation carbon wheel platforms.

0.title: Protected Design Work
0.description: We develop original solutions across multiple programs. Details aren’t public, but our work is IP-aware and documentation-driven.

bullets.0: Original concepts developed with long-term product roadmaps
bullets.1: Design iterations tracked with clear revisions and validation notes
bullets.2: Selective sharing—public copy stays accurate and non-sensitive

1.title: Silent Near‑Zero Engagement Hub
1.description: A hub direction focused on quiet, near-instant engagement—balanced with low weight and long-term durability.

bullets.0: Engagement concept tuned for responsiveness without harsh sound
bullets.1: Balance targets: weight, durability, and serviceability
bullets.2: Benchmarking informed by teardown work on premium hubs and wheelsets

2.title: Next‑Gen Carbon Wheel Platforms
2.description: Our 6–12 month focus: pushing lighter rims further, and developing a more stable integrated carbon wheelset platform.

bullets.0: Lighter rim development with strict stability and consistency goals
bullets.1: Integrated carbon wheelset direction for improved structural stability
bullets.2: Prototypes validated through build feedback and in-house test workflows

privacy.title: Pernyataan privasi
privacy.policyHeading: Dasar privasi untuk laman web e‑dagang
privacy.section1Body: Selamat datang ke [www.tanzanite.site]. Kami menghargai privasi anda dan komited untuk melindungi maklumat peribadi anda. Dasar privasi ini menerangkan bagaimana kami mengumpul, menggunakan, mendedahkan dan melindungi data anda apabila anda melawati laman web kami [www.tanzanite.site] dan menggunakan perkhidmatan kami.
privacy.section2Intro: Kami mungkin mengumpul jenis maklumat peribadi berikut:
privacy.identityDesc: Nama penuh, nama pengguna, kata laluan
privacy.contactDesc: Alamat e‑mel, nombor telefon, alamat penghantaran/pembayaran
privacy.transactionDesc: Sejarah pembelian, butiran pembayaran (diproses melalui gerbang pembayaran pihak ketiga yang selamat)
privacy.technicalDesc: Alamat IP, jenis pelayar, maklumat peranti, kuki
privacy.useManageAccount: Mengurus akaun anda dan menyediakan sokongan pelanggan
privacy.useImproveSite: Menambah baik fungsi laman dan pengalaman pengguna
privacy.section4Intro: Kami mungkin berkongsi maklumat anda dengan:
privacy.shareServiceProviders: Penyedia perkhidmatan: pemproses pembayaran, rakan logistik, alat analitik
privacy.shareLegalAuthorities: Pihak berkuasa perundangan: jika dikehendaki undang‑undang atau untuk melindungi hak kami
privacy.shareBusinessTransfers: Urus niaga perniagaan: sekiranya berlaku penggabungan, pengambilalihan atau pemindahan aset
privacy.shareNoSale: Kami tidak menjual data peribadi anda kepada mana‑mana pihak ketiga.
privacy.section5Intro: Kami menggunakan kuki dan teknologi yang serupa untuk:
privacy.cookiesSettings: Anda boleh mengurus tetapan kuki dalam pelayar anda.
privacy.section6Body: Kami melaksanakan langkah teknikal dan organisasi yang sesuai untuk melindungi data anda daripada capaian, perubahan, pendedahan atau pemusnahan tanpa kebenaran.
privacy.section7Intro: Bergantung pada bidang kuasa anda, anda mungkin mempunyai hak berikut:
privacy.rightsAccess: Mengakses, membetulkan atau memadam data peribadi anda
privacy.rightsWithdrawConsent: Menarik balik kebenaran anda pada bila‑bila masa
privacy.rightsContact: Untuk menggunakan hak ini, sila hubungi kami.
privacy.section8Body: Jika anda berada di luar [negara anda], data anda mungkin dipindahkan ke dan diproses di [negara anda], di mana undang‑undang perlindungan data mungkin berbeza daripada bidang kuasa anda.
privacy.section9Body: Kami mungkin mengemas kini Dasar Privasi ini dari semasa ke semasa. Sebarang perubahan akan diterbitkan di halaman ini dengan tarikh berkuat kuasa yang dikemas kini.

tireGuides.desc: Tire width to rim inner width helper

parameter.title: Parameter definitions
parameter.intro: Use these definitions to double-check your rim and hub data before calculating. Small measurement differences can change the spoke length.

erd.title: ERD (Effective Rim Diameter)
erd.desc: The diameter at the spoke nipple seats inside the rim. Use the rim brand's ERD spec or measure it with two nipples and a caliper.

flangeDiameter.title: Flange diameter
flangeDiameter.desc: The circle diameter through the spoke hole centers on the hub flange (left and right can be different).

centerToFlange.title: Center-to-flange
centerToFlange.desc: The distance from the hub centerline to each flange (left and right). This affects dish and spoke length asymmetry.

holeCount.title: Spoke hole count
holeCount.desc: Must match both rim and hub (e.g. 24/28/32). Make sure you select the same count for front and rear.

crossPattern.title: Cross pattern
crossPattern.desc: How many times each spoke crosses other spokes (2x/3x/4x). Higher cross typically increases spoke length.

parameter.note: Tip: If you are unsure, use the manufacturer's published specs. If you measure yourself, measure twice and enter values to the same unit (mm).
